atomicity.message: Staged changes add one read-only Burpvalve hash --staged helper and its focused command tests for bead project-readiness-kit-oxp-hash-staged-helper-a48.

conditions.message: The staged Go command/test payload is formatted, whitespace-clean, and passes focused and full staged-slice tests.
evidence: ScarletMarsh verified git diff --cached --name-status showed exactly A cmd/burpvalve/hash_test.go and M cmd/burpvalve/main.go.
ScarletMarsh verified git diff --cached --check exited 0 and gofmt -l on the staged files produced no output.
Focused staged-slice tests and go test ./... passed.

conditions.message: The helper avoids duplicating the hashing implementation and confines new code to command wiring/result formatting.
evidence: BrightOwl inspected the staged diff and confirmed runHash reuses backpressure.HashStagedPayload with backpressure.GitStagedReader.
BrightOwl verified clean staged snapshot focused tests passed for cmd/burpvalve and internal/backpressure hash coverage.

conditions.message: The helper strengthens verifier evidence by exposing the canonical hash path instead of encouraging a shortcut hash.
evidence: BrightOwl verified hash --staged --json returned the same staged_payload_hash as verifier prompts for this payload.
BrightOwl observed tests compare hash --staged output against verifier prompts and that help warns naive git diff hashing is not equivalent.

conditions.message: The new command surfaces have focused tests for the main behaviors and edge path introduced by this payload.
evidence: BrightOwl identified tests covering JSON behavior, included/excluded payload records, generated evidence exclusion, warning text, verifier-prompt hash parity, human output, required --staged failure, and robot help.

conditions.message: The staged payload satisfies this bead's stated acceptance criteria.
evidence: BrightOwl compared br show acceptance criteria with the staged implementation: read-only helper, canonical HashStagedPayload reuse, generated exclusion visibility, robot/help docs, and tests.
Clean staged snapshot checks passed, including go test ./... and git diff --cached --check.

conditions.message: The verifier evidence is concrete and the new command improves future hash-bound evidence by reporting included paths, generated exclusions, prefixes, and the canonical warning.
evidence: ScarletMarsh reply records exact staged payload hash, manifest hash, staged path list, commands run, and observed outputs.
hash --staged --json emits staged_payload_hash, included_paths, staged_payload, hash_excluded_staged_payload, excluded_paths, generated_path_prefixes, and warning.

conditions.message: The staged payload is scoped to the hash-staged helper and its tests.
evidence: BrightOwl verified git diff --cached --name-status showed exactly A cmd/burpvalve/hash_test.go and M cmd/burpvalve/main.go.
BrightOwl inspected the diff and found changes limited to hash command, robot docs/output descriptions/notes, and focused tests.

conditions.message: The new command is read-only and the staged implementation does not write files, stage files, commit, run hooks, or perform irreversible operations.
evidence: ScarletMarsh inspected runHash and found it validates --staged, calls HashStagedPayload, inspects StagedEntries, builds a result, and writes stdout only.
Robot notes state hash --staged is read-only and never writes files, stages files, commits files, or runs hooks.

conditions.message: The helper reports the canonical payload and generated exclusions without hiding excluded evidence paths.
evidence: BrightOwl verified runHash returns hash-included staged payload records and hash-excluded generated staged payload records.
BrightOwl verified tests stage a generated attestation JSON and assert it is hash-excluded while README remains hash-included.

conditions.message: The new surface is a local read-only reporter over the current index and does not broaden security-sensitive execution boundaries.
evidence: BrightOwl inspected the staged diff and found use of internal Go APIs only, with no shell execution, network access, credential handling, or external command construction.
BrightOwl verified --root follows existing command patterns and is passed to internal staged-reader/hash code.

conditions.message: No governed visual surface exists in this staged payload.
evidence: ScarletMarsh verified staged paths are only cmd/burpvalve/hash_test.go and cmd/burpvalve/main.go.
The change adds a text/JSON CLI helper, not browser UI, canvas, screenshot, responsive layout, or visual assets.

conditions.message: The helper uses the existing bounded staged-hash path and adds no obvious unbounded background work, network calls, or persistent process.
evidence: ScarletMarsh observed runHash wraps work in backpressure.WithTimeout and calls the staged payload hash reader and staged entry inspection once.
No polling loops, background goroutines, network I/O, large persistent caches, or broad scans beyond the current staged entry set were introduced.

conditions.message: The helper gives verifiers read-only visibility into the staged hash without taking autonomous repository actions.
evidence: BrightOwl verified robot notes state hash --staged is read-only and never writes files, stages files, commits files, or runs hooks.
BrightOwl inspected runHash and found it reads staged entries, computes/reports fields, and writes output to stdout only.
